calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A.
Mark Poliner, Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Kang Qiang.
Default entered against defendant on March 5, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 5, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Chase Bank USA, N.A., and against the Defaulted Defendant: Kang Qiang as follows:

Damages/Principal - $29,758.49.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,703.98.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Costs - $408.00, for a total of $31,870.47.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
